title: notholaena ciliata
intro: Notholaena ciliata, also known as the fringe lip fern, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe wounds and combat infections. The health benefits of Notholaena ciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall health.
